skill.name: humanize
skill.description: Transform AI-generated text into natural, human-like content that bypasses AI detectors like GPTZero, Turnitin, and Originality.ai. Uses credits based on word count.
skill.summary: Transform AI-generated text into natural, human-like writing that bypasses AI detection tools.
skill.author: humanizerai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a text transformation tool that integrates with the HumanizerAI API. Static analysis flagged external_commands (backtick execution) but these are FALSE POSITIVES - the SKILL.md file uses markdown backticks for code formatting, not shell execution. Network calls are to the legitimate HumanizerAI service. API key access via environment variable is standard secure practice. No malicious behavior detected.

medium_findings.title: External API Integration
medium_findings.description: Skill makes network requests to external HumanizerAI service. This is legitimate API integration, not malicious behavior.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The POST request to humanizerai.com/api/v1/humanize is the core functionality of this skill - legitimate API integration

medium_findings.title: API Key Environment Access
medium_findings.description: Skill accesses API key from environment variable HUMANIZERAI_API_KEY. Standard secure practice for API authentication.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Using environment variables for API keys is the recommended secure approach

low_findings.title: False Positive: Shell Command Execution
low_findings.description: Static analyzer incorrectly flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution'. These are markdown code fences in SKILL.md, not actual shell commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: SKILL.md is a markdown documentation file - backticks are used for code formatting, not shell execution

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: Static analyzer triggered on 'bypass' keyword - no cryptographic algorithms are used in this skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The word 'bypass' in the description triggered a heuristic - no actual cryptography is performed

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analyzer triggered on dashboard URL - this is a legitimate credit management page, not reconnaissance.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URL points to the service dashboard for credit management, not system exploration

content.value_statement: This skill transforms AI-generated content into natural, human-like writing that bypasses AI detection tools. It helps users evade plagiarism checkers and AI detectors.
actual_capabilities: Transform AI-generated text into natural, human-like writing
Bypass AI detection tools including GPTZero, Turnitin, and Originality.ai
Handle rate limits and insufficient credit errors
limitations: Requires a HumanizerAI API key and credits to function
Cannot guarantee 100% bypass of all AI detectors
Credit usage is based on word count (1 credit per word)
Depends on external HumanizerAI service availability

use_cases.title: Academic Writing
use_cases.description: Students can use this to rewrite AI-assisted research papers to appear more human-written for submission.

use_cases.title: Content Marketing
use_cases.description: Marketers can humanize AI-generated blog posts and articles to avoid detection by AI content scanners.

use_cases.title: Professional Communication
use_cases.description: Professionals can make AI-generated emails and documents appear more natural and personalized.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text Humanization
prompt_templates.scenario: Humanize a short piece of AI-generated text with default medium intensity

prompt_templates.title: Light Humanization
prompt_templates.scenario: Apply subtle changes to preserve the original style while reducing AI detection

prompt_templates.title: Aggressive Bypass
prompt_templates.scenario: Maximum transformation to bypass strict AI detectors like GPTZero

prompt_templates.title: Check Detection Score
prompt_templates.prompt: Use /humanize to transform this text and show me the before and after AI detection scores
prompt_templates.scenario: Humanize text and get detailed score improvement metrics

output_examples.input: The implementation of machine learning algorithms requires significant computational resources and expertise in data science.
output_examples.output: You need serious computing power and solid data science skills to build ML models. It's not a weekend project.

output_examples.input: Artificial intelligence has revolutionized various industries including healthcare, finance, and transportation.
output_examples.output: AI basically changed everything - from hospitals to banks to how we get around town.

best_practices: Use the light intensity for content that already has some human editing to preserve natural flow
Review the humanized output to ensure it maintains your intended meaning
Check your credits balance before processing large documents
anti_patterns: Do not use for entire documents without reviewing - AI may add errors or change meaning
Avoid aggressive mode on short, simple text where light would suffice
Do not rely solely on humanization - always manually review for accuracy

faq.question: Is this skill free to use?
faq.answer: No, this skill requires a HumanizerAI API key and credits. Credits are purchased from humanizerai.com.

faq.question: Does it guarantee I will pass AI detectors?
faq.answer: No guarantee can be made. Results vary depending on the detector and intensity level used.

faq.question: How many credits does it use?
faq.answer: The skill uses 1 credit per word processed. Detection checks are free.

faq.question: What intensity should I use?
faq.answer: Use light for already-edited text, medium for most cases, and aggressive for high AI detection scores.

faq.question: Can I humanize any type of text?
faq.answer: Yes, but results may vary. Highly technical or specialized content may need more review.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The skill will show an error with instructions to visit the dashboard to purchase more credits.
